title: Knockback Fix
description: Fixes issues with knockback on servers.
body:
# This project is no longer maintained!
I'd suggest using [KBSync](https://modrinth.com/plugin/knockbacksync) instead as it works better.

## Currently Fixed issues
- "Knockback Scaling" - Reduced knockback with high ping. [Video by Intel Edits showing the bug.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=heVTp1urhb4)
